ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time when the match was recorded */,
  "point" INTEGER /* Point in the match */,
  "our_score" INTEGER /* Our team's score at the time of recording */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Opponent's score at the time of recording */,
  "started_on_offense" INTEGER /* Indicates if our team started on offense */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, tournament, friendly) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., in_progress, completed, postponed) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match for which stats are recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player whose stats are being logged */,
  "scored" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player scored during the match */,
  "possessions" INTEGER /* Number of possessions the player had */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers committed by the player */,
  "thrower_errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors made by the thrower */,
  "receiver_errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors made by the receiver */,
  "defensive_blocks" INTEGER /* Number of defensive blocks made by the player */,
  "opposition_errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors made by the opposition */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Total distance covered by the player during the match */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_received" INTEGER /* Number of fouls received by the player */,
  "player_rating" REAL /* Rating for the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match where the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., score, foul, timeout) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., sensor, referee) */,
  "event_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assist_stats" (
  "assist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assist record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match where the assist occurred */,
  "assisting_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player making the assist */,
  "assisted_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving the assist */,
  "assist_type" TEXT /* Type of assist (e.g., pass, cross) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assist_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assist_stats_assisting_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("assisting_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assist_stats_assisted_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("assisted_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "pos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played during the match */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation of the team during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored in the match */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made in the match */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made in the match */,
  "match_winner" TEXT /* Winner of the match */,
  "match_draw" INTEGER /* Indicates if the match was a draw */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
